name: @gitgecko/plug-mcp-meta-tools
description: The second mcp-gateway plug (INV-2.3 proving plug) — fits the mcp-gateway socket alongside plug-mcp-exposers. Exposes operational/introspection MCP tools: list_plugs (enumerate active plugs + owners), health_check (orchestrator liveness), and describe_models (the model catalog). These let any MCP-consuming agent query GitGecko's own state. Proves the non-exclusive interchangeability invariant: both exposer plugs coexist, each registering distinct tools.
